title: If you were to create import a character to NGE who what
display_title: If you were to create import a character to NGE who what
wikitext:
[]: If you were to create/import a character to NGE, who/what?             Quote Post by Stryker » Fri Mar 11, 2011 4:14 pm So, if there were to be a character of your choice, or if you want to create a character (hell, put yourself in the Evaverse), who or what would it be? Oh, it would be handy to use this format if your going to create your own: Name: (Duh) Age: (And btw, duh) Origin: (You can if you want.) Family: (Just their names.. and if they are alive. Only do if you want.) Appearance: (optional, and if you can draw, kudos) Personality: (The tough one) Why: ("cause it would be cool..." "It would flip the Evaverse upside down", stuff like that) I shall go first (And no, I won't put in my failed doujinshi character, because that would be out of taste), I guess. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Fri Mar 11, 2011 4:42 pm As much as I hate them as characters, I can't help but think that Cloud and Squall (from FF7 and 8, as if you didn't already know) would fit in perfectly to NGE. Especially Squall.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Mar 11, 2011 4:52 pm Jessemon wrote: As much as I hate them as characters, I can't help but think that Cloud and Squall (from FF7 and 8, as if you didn't already know) would fit in perfectly to NGE. Especially Squall.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Fri Mar 11, 2011 4:53 pm Jessemon wrote: As much as I hate them as characters, I can't help but think that Cloud and Squall (from FF7 and 8, as if you didn't already know) would fit in perfectly to NGE. Especially Squall.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Fri Mar 11, 2011 4:58 pm Heavy from TF2 would be like, "Who sent all these babies to fight?", then destroy the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Mar 11, 2011 5:10 pm Related topic -- http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=5697 Bringing in increasingly large numbers of outsiders is what my fanfics have all been about. If I'm stuck with just one, it'd have to be Name: Lady Nancy Elanor of Clan Wolf Age: 98 in own worldline Origin: A posthuman with a mission, from about 1200 years downstream. Family: Base archetype Jeanne Wolf born mid 21st century in a different parallel Appearance: Silver hair and eyes, skin coloured like wood ash. Height 143cm. Personality: Cynical, matter of fact, with a puckish sense of humour at times. Why: To get the happy ending right .

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Mar 11, 2011 5:16 pm NGE is one of the frachise where I WOULDT put others in, because the composition of the characters struck me as so perfect. The cast has everything and yet forms a whole. Or well, I thought so before I watched Rebuild and now reached the conclusion that old!NGE desperately needed Mari. IF I had to insert someone it would be Naruto Uzumaki from the epynomious Shonen Manga (or any other generic optimistic Shonen protagonist - Naruto is mainly my personal favourite) so he can cheer everybody up / beat sense into them like he did with an astonishing number of ppl from his own frachise. I have yet to see Gurren Lagann, but judging by the internet Memes, about everyone from that Frachise would also do the trick.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Fri Mar 11, 2011 6:15 pm Nice find Mr. Tines. But this is a bit more casual. Lets see, if I were to put a character that is pre-made, I think it would be Auron from FF10. He'd be the in-movie philosopher that completely mind-fucks Shinji until he finally understands what he is saying, in which at that point becomes a bamf (Like Tidus).

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Fri Mar 11, 2011 6:33 pm Johan Liebert Why yes, I am a sadistic bastard.

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Fri Mar 11, 2011 6:44 pm Allemann wrote: Yeah, they both have experiences fighting with enemies forty times their sizes and summoning equally large monsters.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Fri Mar 11, 2011 7:06 pm Jessemon wrote: Also, they're both angsty as FUCK (which I think is what liquidus118 was implying) : )

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Fri Mar 11, 2011 7:45 pm I bet Superman would.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Mar 11, 2011 10:22 pm liquidus118 wrote: James Sunderland from Silent Hill 2. Only because he's the only other character I associate with psychological mind-fuckery.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sat Mar 12, 2011 12:19 am Hmmm. I don't think I would. I tend to react very badly to adding characters to NGE in fanfics, since there's so much going on with the main cast already. It's part of the reason I object to Mari in Rebuild -- in a reduced format the central cast is already starving for attention, and you wanna add characters?!? Madness. If I were to do it at all I'd be looking at how people in other countries are reacting to Eva. The pilot of Unit 04 might be particularly interesting, for example. And I bet there was an American originally slated to pilot Unit 03 before they got skittish and shipped it off to Japan. What's his story, and how did he take being out of a job? Might be something to that. It also might be interesting to look at the facilities that manufactured the MP Evas. No pilots there (probably), but you just know there's a story. And how is it that they all look alike even though they were manufactured all over the place? Isn't that odd? I'd very much like to know who was behind that and how they relate to Kyoko, Yui, Fuyutsuki, and the rest. The German element would be particularly interesting for obvious reasons. As for who specifically...I dunno, some researcher type. Someone distinctive enough to be interesting but innocuous enough to fit the position.

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Sat Mar 12, 2011 12:34 am liquidus118 wrote: ...Whatever. You just don't understand my pain! Also: Batman. Because who the fuck would argue with Batman in a giant God-alien-mother-robot? I don't follow comics but the guy never seemed to get over his dead Mother in anything I've seen.

[]:             Quote Post by Born of Lilith » Sat Mar 12, 2011 10:58 pm L from Death Note working for NERV would be interesting, and Spike from Cowboy Bebop and Kaji would be a duo of awesomeness.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Sat Mar 12, 2011 11:41 pm ^ That would be interesting, seeing as they're both voiced by the same person - one Koichi Yamadera.

[]:             Quote Post by Jessemon » Sun Mar 13, 2011 12:40 am Born of Lilith wrote: L from Death Note working for NERV would be interesting, and Spike from Cowboy Bebop and Kaji would be a duo of awesomeness.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sun Mar 13, 2011 12:10 pm ^And a plot that's actually written in advance.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sun Mar 13, 2011 3:01 pm All good inserts were already done in Super Robot Wars.
